plan.headline: Your new AI staff member
plan.caption: We built an AI that runs on your computer, answers your leads and handles your socials automatically. Jarvis is live now. Link in bio. 🦞🤖
plan.facebook_caption: We built something for business owners drowning in admin. Jarvis is a set-and-forget AI assistant that runs on your computer 24/7, answers your leads within minutes, and handles your Instagram automatically. It costs less than a coffee a month in API usage. Live now at the link in our bio. 🦞🤖

plan.headline: Missing calls costs you
plan.caption: The first business to reply wins 78% of jobs. Jarvis makes sure that is always you, even at 11pm on a Sunday. 🦞
plan.facebook_caption: Research shows the first business to reply to a lead wins the job 78% of the time. If you are on a job, in a meeting, or asleep, that lead is gone. Jarvis replies within seconds at any hour. Link in bio. 🦞

plan.headline: Still doing it yourself
plan.caption: You started the business to do the work, not manage the Instagram. Jarvis posts twice a day, every day. Link in bio. 🦞
plan.facebook_caption: Most small business owners spend 2 hours or more per week on social media content. That adds up to over 100 hours a year. Jarvis generates and schedules your posts daily, on-brand and automatically. Link in bio. 🦞

plan.headline: Your competitor just replied
plan.caption: Speed wins leads. Jarvis monitors your inbox and replies to every new enquiry within minutes, day or night. 🦞🤖
plan.facebook_caption: Speed is the single biggest factor in winning leads. If you are busy and cannot reply for a few hours, that lead has already moved on. Jarvis monitors your enquiry inbox and sends a personalised reply within minutes of every new message, around the clock. 🦞🤖

plan.headline: Google cannot find you
plan.caption: A slow website costs you Google rankings right now. Jarvis monitors your Core Web Vitals every morning and flags issues before they cost you. 🦞
plan.facebook_caption: Most small business websites load too slowly and get penalised by Google as a result. The problem is most owners never know until they stop getting calls. Jarvis monitors your site performance every morning and alerts you if anything needs fixing. 🦞

plan.headline: What runs while you sleep
plan.caption: A lead came in at 2am. Jarvis replied instantly, they booked a call, and a job was confirmed before 9am. 🦞🤖
plan.facebook_caption: A website enquiry arrived at 2am. Jarvis sent a personalised reply within two minutes, the lead booked a discovery call, and a job was confirmed by the time the owner sat down for breakfast. This is what it looks like to never miss a lead. 🦞🤖

plan.headline: Admin is not your job
plan.caption: 10 automated tasks running daily. Your job is the work, not the admin. Jarvis is live. Link in bio. 🦞
plan.facebook_caption: Jarvis runs 10 specialist tasks every day without you touching a thing. Morning digest, lead replies, Instagram posts, Google Ads monitoring, SEO health checks, email triage, and more. All running in the background while you do the actual work. Link in bio. 🦞

plan.headline: The $5 per month hire
plan.caption: Jarvis costs roughly $5 a month in AI usage. No salary, no super, no sick days. Just 10 agents running your business admin daily. 🦞🤖
plan.facebook_caption: A full time admin employee costs $50,000 or more per year. Jarvis handles the same repetitive tasks for roughly $5 a month in Anthropic API costs. No payroll, no onboarding, no sick days. It runs every day and reports back to you each morning. Link in bio. 🦞🤖

plan.headline: 10 minutes to set up
plan.caption: Jarvis is live at improveyoursite.com/jarvis. Mac or Windows. 10 minutes to set up, then it runs every single day. 🦞
plan.facebook_caption: Jarvis is now live. Download it from improveyoursite.com/jarvis, run the installer, complete the 10-minute setup wizard, and Jarvis starts working for your business immediately. It runs every day automatically. Mac and Windows supported. From $30. 🦞
